steps.title: Recognize the parallel structure
steps.content: Both sentences describe Dove applying the same compositional technique: embedding personal narratives within historical contexts (Great Migration for Thomas, Civil Rights Movement for Beulah). This parallel treatment is the key signal.

steps.title: Match the parallel pattern
steps.content:
Similarly signals the same technique applied to both characters. The others suggest consequence, specificity, or contrast rather than parallelism.

This matches the correct answer — D is correct.
